LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Jumpsuit.description: A practical crimson and g老旧 jumpsuit worn by s老旧iers and low-ranking military personnel of the People's Liberation Army. The bright red fabric bears the iconic yellow star, symbolizing loyalty to the state. While offering minimal protection, it's designed for comfort during long duty shifts and provides basic insulation against the elements.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Jumpsuit.label: 中国陆军连衣裤
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Jumpsuit_General.descrip: 标准中国陆军连身裤的军官变体，具有额外的装饰元素、肩板和强化面料。这款制服由中国人民解放军军官和高级官员穿着，在保持标准版实用设计的同时，赢得了尊重和权威。额外的装饰和奖牌增强了佩戴者的信心和谈判风度。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Jumpsuit_General.label: 中国陆军将领连衣裤
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Jumpsuit_Winter.descript: A heavily insulated variant of the standard Chinese army jumpsuit, designed for operations in harsh winter conditions. This padded crimson uniform features a quilted construction with synthetic insulation, fur-lined collar, and reinforced seams. Originally developed for Chinese troops stationed in the frozen northern territories, it provides excellent protection against extreme c老旧 while maintaining the distinctive red and g老旧 color scheme of the People's Republic.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Jumpsuit_Winter.label: 中国陆军冬季连衣裤
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Stealth_Suit.description: 这款合身的隐形服是中国军事技术的尖端产品，采用了先进的光弯曲技术和隔音材料。该套装由中国人民解放军为秘密行动而开发，采用灵活的聚合物结构和集成电路，可提供主动伪装功能。其轻量化设计和机动性增强使其成为渗透、侦察和暗杀任务的理想选择。该套装的标志性深红色和黑色配色方案在激活时可以转变以与周围环境融为一体。
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Stealth_Suit.label: 中国隐形服
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Submariner.description: A specialized uniform worn by submariners of the People's Liberation Army Navy. This practical ensemble features water-resistant fabrics, reinforced stitching, and multiple sealed pockets designed to protect essential equipment in damp, confined submarine environments. The dark navy and crimson design includes reflective strips for emergency visibility and a high collar for protection against c老旧 ocean winds. While not a full diving suit, it provides basic environmental protection and is valued by sailors, dock workers, and naval personnel.
LanguageData.FCP_Apparel_PRC_Submariner.label: 中国潜艇兵制服
